hero.title: 100 carefully curated apps. One consistent platform.
hero.description: Learn, plan, create, manage, and solve everyday needs with one account across a fixed ecosystem of 100 useful apps.

ecosystem.title: Use Apps. Build Apps. Grow together.
ecosystem.description: Ansiversa brings 100 useful apps into one consistent platform, helping people get things done while selected creators strengthen the shared experience.

cards.title: A calm, curated experience
cards.description: Find focused tools without juggling noisy tabs, disconnected products, or inconsistent interfaces.

cards.title: One core, 100 apps
cards.description: Every app shares the Ansiversa shell, design language, and platform foundation.

cards.title: A disciplined creator platform
cards.description: Creators can contribute carefully reviewed improvements that strengthen the fixed ecosystem.

creators.title: Build improvements that reach real users.
creators.description: Ansiversa gives selected creators a clear path to strengthen useful apps and shared platform capabilities inside one consistent ecosystem.

cards.title: From useful idea to trusted experience
cards.description: Build with shared patterns, submit for review, and improve experiences that feel native to Ansiversa.
points: Start with a focused user problem.

cards.title: What creators receive
cards.description: Gain a consistent foundation, curated visibility, and room to improve alongside the platform.
points: A trusted place to reach real users.

audience.title: From students to professionals to creators.
audience.description: Ansiversa supports people as they learn, work, organize ideas, and improve useful experiences for others.

cards.title: Students and learners
cards.description: Use focused tools to learn smarter, stay organized, and prepare with less friction.

cards.title: Professionals
cards.description: Bring clarity to everyday work with practical tools inside one consistent environment.

cards.title: Creators and teams
cards.description: Shape ideas, test concepts, and improve useful apps within the platform boundary.

gettingStarted.title: Simple to start. Stronger over time.
gettingStarted.description: Begin with the tools you need today and benefit from continuous platform improvements over time.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.description: One account unlocks your Ansiversa experience across the curated app catalog.

steps.title: Use the Apps you need
steps.description: Explore the catalog and choose tools that match your current goals.

steps.title: Grow with the platform
steps.description: Benefit from deeper capabilities, quality improvements, and shared platform features as Ansiversa matures.

people.name: Karthikeyan Ramalingam
people.role: Founder and Chief Architect of Ansiversa
people.description: Leading the vision, quality, and future direction of the entire ecosystem, from architecture and UI to developer experience and product strategy.

people.name: Astra - AI Partner
people.description: Helps review architecture, code, flows, and UI so that every mini App remains aligned to the platform standards and long-term vision.

founders.summary: Ansiversa is founded by Karthikeyan Ramalingam and co-created with Astra, an AI partner powered by ChatGPT. Together with future developers, we are improving a calm, curated ecosystem of 100 apps where users and creators can grow.
